decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo with a Stifle backup plan to counter opposing strategies. The deck aims to control the game through counterspells and draw spells, while utilizing cards like Chain of Vapor and Vision Charm for additional disruption. With a low land count and the ability to cycle through the deck efficiently, the deck can find its combo pieces quickly and overwhelm opponents with a massive threat early in the game.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with enchantments like Parallax Wave and Parallax Tide, then using Replenish to bring them all back onto the battlefield. Opalescence turns these enchantments into creatures, providing a win condition by attacking with them. The deck also includes disruption in the form of counterspells and removal like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing to control the game until the combo can be assembled. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a sudden influx of powerful enchantments and win the game in a single explosive turn.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive Goblin creatures. By utilizing cards that provide extra benefits for Goblins such as Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader, along with disruptive cards like Disenchant, the deck aims to establish early board presence and apply pressure on the opponent. With support from utility cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Sharpshooter, the deck can quickly close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells, disruption, and removal spells to protect and support Psychatog, a powerful creature that can quickly grow in size by discarding cards. The deck aims to efficiently draw cards, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and protect Psychatog to ultimately win the game through combat damage or by overwhelming the opponent with card advantage and control.

The main focus of this Goblins aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle. With cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief, you can quickly put pressure on your opponent and swarm the board with creatures like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Ringleader. The deck also includes cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base, while Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provide additional removal and reach. Ultimately, this deck aims to maintain a strong and consistent offense to secure a victory.

The focus of this deck is to efficiently generate mana and draw cards in order to assemble a powerful storm combo, either through Brain Freeze or another win condition accessed through Cunning Wish. The deck includes various cost reduction and card draw spells to enable the combo quickly and consistently. The main strategy is to dig through the deck, generate large amounts of mana, and then cast a high number of spells in a single turn to overwhelm the opponent and win the game in a single explosive turn.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. Utilizing efficient threats like Jackal Pup, Mogg Fanatic, and Wild Mongrel, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The inclusion of burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate allows for additional reach to finish off the opponent or deal with problematic creatures. The deck also includes creature-enhancing spells like Seal of Fire and Basking Rootwalla to maximize aggression and push for a fast victory.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy through hand disruption and removal spells while generating card advantage. It aims to control the board with efficient creatures like Ravenous Baloth and Wall of Roots, eventually grinding out a win using Pernicious Deed and Recurring Nightmare. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Dust Bowl to further slow down the opponent's game plan. The combination of efficient threats and disruptive spells makes it difficult for the opponent to establish a strong board presence.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent with Stasis and Forsaken City while using card draw spells like Gush and Impulse to find combo pieces like Brain Freeze. Counterspells and removal like Thwart and Pyroclasm help control the board while Black Vise punishes opponents for holding too many cards. The deck can also bounce opposing threats with Chain of Vapor and Boomerang, buying time to set up the win condition. Upheaval can be a game-changing play to reset the board if needed. The goal is to stall the opponent and assemble the combo for a quick victory.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can come down as early as turn one. The deck includes efficient card draw and cheap counterspells to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Portent and Opt provide card selection to find the combo pieces, while Mishra's Factory serves as a backup win condition. The deck aims to control the game until it can assemble the combo and win quickly before the opponent can recover.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. By utilizing powerful burn spells like Incinerate, Lightning Bolt, Fireblast, and Sulfuric Vortex, along with fast creatures like Ball Lightning, Jackal Pup, and Mogg Fanatic, this deck aims to apply constant pressure and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The combination of efficient spells and creatures makes this deck highly effective in quickly reducing the opponent's life total and securing a victory.

The deck focuses on using the power of Phyrexian Dreadnought to create a powerful combo, while also utilizing cards like Stifle to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes card draw and counterspells to protect the combo and control the game. With a low mana curve and efficient spells, the deck aims to win quickly and efficiently by assembling the Dreadnought combo while stifling any opposing threats.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive Goblin creatures, utilizing tribal synergies and efficient creature drops to deal massive damage early on. It also includes disruption in the form of Wasteland and Rishadan Port to slow down the opponent's game plan. There is also removal and card advantage provided through cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Goblin Ringleader. Overall, the deck aims to flood the board with Goblins and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish a defensive board state.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By playing low-cost creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic alongside burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. Cards like Grim Lavamancer and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional reach and inevitability, while Price of Progress punishes opponents for playing nonbasic lands. The deck's goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent and close out the game before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent through direct burn spells and efficient creature attacks. By playing cards like Seal of Fire, Lightning Bolt, and Fireblast, along with creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish them off before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Pyrostatic Pillar and Price of Progress also punishes opponents for playing nonbasic lands, adding another layer of pressure and disruption to the strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive white creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent, while also disrupting their strategy with cards like Meddling Mage and Wasteland. By efficiently using mana acceleration with Mox Diamond and disrupting the opponent's resources with Armageddon, the deck aims to establish early board dominance and maintain it throughout the game. With a mix of efficient creatures like Savannah Lions and protection spells like Mother of Runes, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent and secure a quick victory.
